message:
feat(fnp-python): native fftshift/ifftshift via UFuncArray::roll

Port np.fft.fftshift and np.fft.ifftshift to native Rust. Both become
axis-shape // 2 roll operations (negated for ifftshift) over the
UFuncArray::roll / roll_multi kernels. Handles None / int / tuple axis
forms and negative-axis normalization; falls back to numpy for
non-numeric dtypes, out-of-range axes, or exotic iterable axis encodings
so the numpy error surface stays exact.

br-franken_numpy-hswg
